seo.title: Colleagues Support | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: Health, wellbeing, finance, and professional development resources for Vigil Care Staffing colleagues. Links to support across every area of working life.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.heading: Colleagues Support
fields.sub: The following guide has been designed to offer information, advice and guidance. The guide offers links to support you in your overall health and well-being and areas that may lead to stress and anxiety without the right support.

fields.heading: Health and Well-being
fields.body: In this section you will find links to maintaining a healthy, balanced diet, managing stress and anxiety and exercises for keeping fit.

fields.heading: Mental Well-being
fields.body: The links in this section will guide you in looking after your mental health.

fields.heading: Finance
fields.body: Here you will find links to advice and guidance on managing your finances, debt and benefits you may be entitled too.

fields.heading: Literacy and Numeracy
fields.body: In this section you will find links to support you with literacy and numeracy.

fields.heading: HR (Human Resources)
fields.body: Below are website links that will support you with any HR issues such as, pay and conditions, holiday entitlement, conflict resolution and disciplinaries.

fields.heading: Information Technology
fields.body: The website links below will provide you with support on information technology and developing your skills.

fields.heading: Childcare
fields.body: Here you will find information and guidance on different support available for childcare.

fields.heading: Support Groups and Pages
fields.body: In the last section you will find links to different support groups and networks on a range of different areas as detailed below.
